description: Count occurrences of values in specified columns

variations.name: Count transactions per store
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Count(variable='transaction_id', output_name='transaction_count') | Execute()

variations.name: Count daily active users
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Count(variable='user_id', output_name='daily_active_users') | Execute()

variations.name: Count unique visitors per page
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Count(variable='visitor_id', output_name='unique_visitors') | Execute()

description: Calculate sum of values in specified columns

variations.name: Sum total revenue by product category
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Sum(variable='order_amount', output_name='total_revenue') | Execute()

variations.name: Sum transaction values by customer segment
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Sum(variable='transaction_value', output_name='total_value') | Execute()

variations.name: Sum page views across campaigns
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Sum(variable='page_views', output_name='total_page_views') | Execute()

description: Find maximum values in specified columns

variations.name: Find highest transaction value by region
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Max(variable='transaction_value', output_name='max_transaction') | Execute()

variations.name: Find maximum order size by product category
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Max(variable='order_quantity', output_name='max_order_size') | Execute()

variations.name: Find peak daily active users by app version
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Max(variable='active_users', output_name='peak_users') | Execute()

description: Find minimum values in specified columns

variations.name: Find lowest price point by product category
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Min(variable='price', output_name='min_price') | Execute()

variations.name: Find minimum order value by customer segment
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Min(variable='order_value', output_name='min_order_value') | Execute()

variations.name: Find shortest session duration by device type
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Min(variable='session_duration', output_name='min_duration') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate conversion rate
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Ratio(numerator='purchases', denominator='website_visits', output_name='conversion_rate') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate click-through rate
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Ratio(numerator='clicks', denominator='emails_sent', output_name='ctr') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate revenue per user
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Ratio(numerator='revenue', denominator='users_count', output_name='arpu') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate average customer rating by product
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Mean(variable='rating', output_name='avg_rating') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate mean session duration by user segment
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Mean(variable='session_duration', output_name='mean_duration') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate average order value by marketing channel
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Mean(variable='order_value', output_name='avg_order_value') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate median transaction value by customer segment
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Median(variable='transaction_value', output_name='median_transaction') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate median session duration for mobile users
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Median(variable='session_duration', output_name='median_duration') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate median time to first purchase by acquisition channel
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Median(variable='days_to_purchase', output_name='median_time_to_purchase') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate variance in daily order volumes
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Variance(variable='daily_orders', unbiased=True, output_name='order_volume_variance') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate variance in customer spending across segments
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Variance(variable='customer_spend', unbiased=True, output_name='spend_variance') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate variance in page load times by device type
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Variance(variable='load_time_ms', unbiased=False, output_name='load_time_variance') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate standard deviation of session duration by user type
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | StandardDeviation(variable='session_duration', unbiased=True, output_name='session_duration_std') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate standard deviation of order values for each product category
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | StandardDeviation(variable='order_value', unbiased=True, output_name='order_value_std') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate standard deviation of daily page views over the past month
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | StandardDeviation(variable='daily_page_views', output_name='page_view_std') | Execute()

variations.name: Find correlation between ad spend and sales volume
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Correlation(variable1='ad_spend', variable2='sales_volume', output_name='ad_sales_correlation') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate correlation between email open rates and conversion rates
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Correlation(variable1='open_rate', variable2='conversion_rate', output_name='open_conversion_correlation') | Execute()

variations.name: Measure relationship between page load time and bounce rate
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Correlation(variable1='load_time_ms', variable2='bounce_rate', output_name='load_bounce_correlation') | Execute()

description: Create pivot tables for cross-tabulation analysis

variations.name: Create pivot table of revenue by product and region
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | PivotTable(index='product_name', columns='region', values='revenue', aggfunc='sum', fill_value=0) | Execute()

variations.name: Build pivot table of conversion rates by device type and marketing channel
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | PivotTable(index='device_type', columns='marketing_channel', values='conversion_rate', aggfunc='mean', fill_value=0, output_name='conversion_pivot') | Execute()

variations.name: Create pivot table showing average order value by customer segment and month
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | PivotTable(index='customer_segment', columns='month', values='order_value', aggfunc='mean', output_name='aov_pivot') | Execute()

description: Group data and apply aggregation functions

variations.name: Group sales data by month and calculate total and average order value
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | GroupBy(by='month', agg_dict={'order_value': ['sum', 'mean'], 'orders': 'count'}, output_name='monthly_sales_metrics') | Execute()

variations.name: Group user data by country and calculate average session duration and conversion rate
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | GroupBy(by='country', agg_dict={'session_duration': 'mean', 'converted': 'mean'}, output_name='country_performance') | Execute()

variations.name: Group transactions by customer segment and find maximum, minimum, and average value
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | GroupBy(by='customer_segment', agg_dict={'transaction_value': ['max', 'min', 'mean'], 'transaction_id': 'count'}, output_name='segment_transaction_stats') | Execute()

variations.name: Filter transactions above $100
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Filter(condition=lambda df: df['transaction_amount'] > 100, output_name='high_value_transactions') | Execute()

variations.name: Filter user sessions where bounce rate is less than 20%
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Filter(condition=lambda df: df['bounce_rate'] < 0.2, output_name='engaged_sessions') | Execute()

variations.name: Filter to only include products with more than 50 reviews
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Filter(condition=lambda df: df['review_count'] > 50, output_name='well_reviewed_products') | Execute()

description: Execute the metrics pipeline and return results

variations.name: Execute analysis and return all metrics
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Count(variable='user_id') | Sum(variable='revenue') | Execute()

variations.name: Run the metrics pipeline and show all results
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Mean(variable='order_value') | Max(variable='session_duration') | Execute()

variations.name: Calculate all defined metrics and return the results
variations.example:
pipeline = MetricsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
result = pipeline | Count(variable='transactions') | Sum(variable='revenue') | Mean(variable='order_value') | Execute()
